title: Innovative Italian Steak Trofie Pasta
description: A light and herbal Italian dish featuring lean minced steak and trofie pasta, perfect for a crowd, served in a bento box. This mediterranean-friendly recipe is air fried to perfection.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the trofie pasta according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, basil, parsley, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper to make the herbal sauce.
Add the cooked trofie pasta to the bowl and toss to combine with the herbal sauce.
In a separate pan, air fry the lean minced steak over medium-high heat until it reaches an internal temperature of 145 degrees.
Once the steak is cooked, let it rest for a few minutes before slicing it into thin strips.
Add the sliced steak to the bowl with the pasta and toss to combine.
Sprinkle grated parmesan cheese over the top of the pasta and steak mixture.
Serve the innovative italian steak trofie pasta in a bento box.
Garnish with additional basil and parsley if desired.
